name: get_deliverability_metrics
description: Query aggregate deliverability metrics from SparkPost. Returns counts for injected, delivered, bounced, opened, clicked, and spam-complained messages over a time range. Data can be grouped by recipient domain, sending domain, sending IP, or IP pool. Metrics data is retained for 6 months, much longer than the 10-day event data.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start datetime in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM format (UTC). Required.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End datetime in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM format (UTC). Defaults to now.

parameters.name: metrics
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of metrics to return. Options include: count_targeted, count_injected, count_delivered, count_bounce, count_rejected, count_rendered (opens), count_clicked, count_spam_complaint, total_delivery_time_first, count_delivered_first, count_delivered_subsequent.

parameters.name: precision
parameters.description: Time window precision for grouping. Options: '1min', '5min', '15min', 'hour', 'day', 'month'.

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Standard timezone string for the results. Default: UTC.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Range: 1-10,000.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Metric name to sort results by.
